# Express / Fastify — NocoDB Integration

Generate these files for Express or Fastify projects.

## Files to Generate

### 1. `lib/nocodb.js` (or `.ts` if TypeScript) — Server-side NocoDB client

```javascript
/**
 * NocoDB API Client
 * Generated by nocodb-crud skill
 */

class NocoDBError extends Error {
  constructor(message, status, raw) {
    super(message);
    this.name = 'NocoDBError';
    this.status = status;
    this.raw = raw;
  }
}

const NOCODB_URL = process.env.NOCODB_URL;
const NOCODB_TABLE_ID = process.env.NOCODB_TABLE_ID;
const NOCODB_API_KEY = process.env.NOCODB_API_KEY;

if (!NOCODB_URL || !NOCODB_TABLE_ID || !NOCODB_API_KEY) {
  console.error('Missing NocoDB env vars: NOCODB_URL, NOCODB_TABLE_ID, NOCODB_API_KEY');
}

const endpoint = (path = '') => `${NOCODB_URL}/api/v2/tables/${NOCODB_TABLE_ID}${path}`;

const headers = () => ({
  'xc-token': NOCODB_API_KEY,
  'Content-Type': 'application/json',
});

async function request(url, options = {}) {
  let lastError = null;
  for (let attempt = 0; attempt < 3; attempt++) {
    try {
      const res = await fetch(url, { ...options, headers: { ...headers(), ...options.headers } });
      if (res.status === 429) {
        await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
        continue;
      }
      if (!res.ok) {
        const body = await res.text();
        let parsed;
        try { parsed = JSON.parse(body); } catch { parsed = body; }
        if (res.status === 401) throw new NocoDBError('Auth failed — check NOCODB_API_KEY', 401, parsed);
        if (res.status === 404) throw new NocoDBError('Not found', 404, parsed);
        throw new NocoDBError(`NocoDB error ${res.status}: ${body}`, res.status, parsed);
      }
      const text = await res.text();
      return text ? JSON.parse(text) : {};
    } catch (e) {
      if (e instanceof NocoDBError) throw e;
      lastError = e;
      if (attempt < 2) await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, Math.pow(2, attempt) * 1000));
    }
  }
  throw lastError || new Error('NocoDB request failed after retries');
}

const nocodb = {
  async list(params = {}) {
    const query = new URLSearchParams();
    if (params.limit) query.set('limit', String(params.limit));
    if (params.offset) query.set('offset', String(params.offset));
    if (params.where) query.set('where', params.where);
    if (params.sort) query.set('sort', params.sort);
    if (params.fields) query.set('fields', params.fields);
    if (params.viewId) query.set('viewId', params.viewId);
    const qs = query.toString();
    return request(`${endpoint('/records')}${qs ? '?' + qs : ''}`);
  },

  async get(rowId) {
    return request(endpoint(`/records/${rowId}`));
  },

  async create(data) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },

  async bulkCreate(records) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'POST', body: JSON.stringify(records) });
  },

  async update(data) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify(data) });
  },

  async bulkUpdate(records) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'PATCH', body: JSON.stringify(records) });
  },

  async delete(id) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify({ Id: id }) });
  },

  async bulkDelete(ids) {
    return request(endpoint('/records'), { method: 'DELETE', body: JSON.stringify(ids.map(Id => ({ Id }))) });
  },
};

module.exports = { nocodb, NocoDBError };
```

### 2. `routes/nocodb.js` — Express router

```javascript
const express = require('express');
const { nocodb } = require('../lib/nocodb');
const router = express.Router();

// GET /api/nocodb — list records
router.get('/', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const { limit, offset, where, sort, fields } = req.query;
    const data = await nocodb.list({
      limit: limit ? Number(limit) : 25,
      offset: offset ? Number(offset) : 0,
      where: where || undefined,
      sort: sort || undefined,
      fields: fields || undefined,
    });
    res.json(data);
  } catch (e) {
    res.status(e.status || 500).json({ error: e.message });
  }
});

// GET /api/nocodb/:id — get single record
router.get('/:id', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const data = await nocodb.get(req.params.id);
    res.json(data);
  } catch (e) {
    res.status(e.status || 500).json({ error: e.message });
  }
});

// POST /api/nocodb — create record(s)
router.post('/', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const data = Array.isArray(req.body)
      ? await nocodb.bulkCreate(req.body)
      : await nocodb.create(req.body);
    res.status(201).json(data);
  } catch (e) {
    res.status(e.status || 500).json({ error: e.message });
  }
});

// PATCH /api/nocodb — update record(s)
router.patch('/', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    const data = Array.isArray(req.body)
      ? await nocodb.bulkUpdate(req.body)
      : await nocodb.update(req.body);
    res.json(data);
  } catch (e) {
    res.status(e.status || 500).json({ error: e.message });
  }
});

// DELETE /api/nocodb — delete record(s)
router.delete('/', async (req, res) => {
  try {
    if (req.body.ids) {
      const data = await nocodb.bulkDelete(req.body.ids);
      return res.json(data);
    }
    const data = await nocodb.delete(req.body.id || req.body.Id);
    res.json(data);
  } catch (e) {
    res.status(e.status || 500).json({ error: e.message });
  }
});

module.exports = router;
```

### Mounting instruction (add to main server file)

```javascript
// In your main app.js / server.js / index.js:
const nocodbRoutes = require('./routes/nocodb');
app.use('/api/nocodb', nocodbRoutes);
```

## Fastify Variant

If the project uses Fastify, generate a Fastify plugin instead of an Express router.
The `lib/nocodb.js` client stays the same. Replace the routes file with:

```javascript
async function nocodbRoutes(fastify) {
  const { nocodb } = require('../lib/nocodb');

  fastify.get('/api/nocodb', async (req, reply) => {
    const { limit, offset, where, sort, fields } = req.query;
    return nocodb.list({ limit: Number(limit) || 25, offset: Number(offset) || 0, where, sort, fields });
  });

  fastify.get('/api/nocodb/:id', async (req) => {
    return nocodb.get(req.params.id);
  });

  fastify.post('/api/nocodb', async (req, reply) => {
    const data = Array.isArray(req.body) ? await nocodb.bulkCreate(req.body) : await nocodb.create(req.body);
    reply.code(201);
    return data;
  });

  fastify.patch('/api/nocodb', async (req) => {
    return Array.isArray(req.body) ? await nocodb.bulkUpdate(req.body) : await nocodb.update(req.body);
  });

  fastify.delete('/api/nocodb', async (req) => {
    if (req.body.ids) return nocodb.bulkDelete(req.body.ids);
    return nocodb.delete(req.body.id || req.body.Id);
  });
}

module.exports = nocodbRoutes;
```

## Adaptation Notes

- Check if the project uses ESM (`"type": "module"` in package.json) — if so, use `import/export` instead of `require/module.exports`
- If `dotenv` isn't already in dependencies, add `require('dotenv').config()` at the top of the entry file
- For TypeScript Express projects, generate `.ts` files with proper types
